entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, the primary crop screened for resistance to Phytophthora blight

entities.name: ATYLOSIA
entities.description: A genus of legumes, including A. sericea and A. platycarpa, screened for resistance

entities.name: PHYTOPHTHORA DRECHSLERI
entities.description: The oomycete pathogen Phytophthora drechsleri var. cajani that causes blight

entities.name: PHYTOPHTHORA BLIGHT
entities.description: A disease caused by Phytophthora drechsleri affecting pigeon pea and related species

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of plant accessions to withstand infection by Phytophthora drechsleri

entities.name: POT CULTURE TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A screening method involving soil drenching with a macerated suspension of the pathogen in pots

entities.name: FIELD TESTING
entities.description: The process of confirming resistance to the pathogen under natural field conditions

relationships.description: Screened for resistance to Phytophthora blight
Screened for resistance to Phytophthora blight
Causes the disease known as Phytophthora blight
The trait of resistance is measured against this condition
Used as a primary screening method to identify resistance
Used to confirm the resistance identified in pot cultures
Applied to screen pigeon pea accessions
